AcceptGift_(O)StardropTea: Waw, mae'n blasu jyst fel cnau euraidd! Mae'n wych!
AcceptGift_(TR)ParrotEgg: Mae'r ŵy yma'n annwyl... Mae'n faban! Diolch am ddod â fe i mi, bydda i'n cadw e'n saff.
Mon4: Dwi 'di dysgu llawer o fy nheulu parot...#$b#Ond dwi'n siŵr mae 'na lawer dydw i ddim yn gwybod.$s
Tue: When Sun is angry, it feels good in the jungle.#$e#Sun can't find us beneath the leaves. We trick him! Haha...$h
Wed2: Be careful in the volcano... the spirits don't like outsiders.
Thu: Have you met the others like you?#$b#I don't talk to them much. I feel safer with my own kind...$3
Fri: One time... I was at the top of the volcano at night, and I saw lights far, far away.#$b#I wonder if there are other bird families out there?$3
Fri4: I wonder if I could see your home from the top of the volcano?
Sat: ...I'm sad today.$s#$e#You go on... have fun. Let me be sad.$s
Sun: When it rains, strange birds visit.#$b#I try to speak to them... but they fly away.$s#$b#I guess they don't want to be friends...$s
